channel.title: Aroostook County Probate Court
channel.description: No probate-specific news/RSS feed exists at any of the 16 counties; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official probate court page. Sitewide WordPress /feed/ exists but is not probate-specific. Page lists a 'Probate Court Calendar' PDF per year — a new year's calendar being added is a useful change signal.
